title: CUAP Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 60 Posts
short_info: Central University of Andhra Pradesh (CUAP) Assistant Professor Notification 2026 has been released on 22 May 2026 on the official website cuap.ac.in. A total of 60 vacancies have been announced through the CUAP Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree with 55% marks (or equivalent) in concerned/relevant/allied subject, NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2009/2016
qualification.details: Master's degree with 55% marks (or equivalent) in the concerned/relevant/allied subject. NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2009/2016.

salary_details.details: Assistant Professor: Rs. 50,000/- to Rs. 75,000/- per month or Rs. 1,500/- per lecture.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CUAP to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
